DCHAT.Settings.cleanerChat.Name: Cleaner Chat
DCHAT.Settings.cleanerChat.Hint: Hides avatars and usernames in chat headers for a cleaner appearance.
DCHAT.Settings.compactChat.Name: Compact Chat
DCHAT.Settings.compactChat.Hint: Applies visual changes to the chat to make it more compact.
DCHAT.Settings.CollapsibleFormula.Name: Collapsible Formula
DCHAT.Settings.CollapsibleFormula.Hint: Hides dice formulas and makes them collapsible.
DCHAT.Settings.hideDamageTraits.Name: Hide Damage Traits
DCHAT.Settings.traitFilter.Name: Trait Filter
DCHAT.Settings.traitFilter.Hint: Hides low-impact traits and limits the number of visible chat traits to 3 (shows all traits when clicked).
DCHAT.Settings.HideDamageButtons.Name: Hide Damage Buttons
DCHAT.Settings.HideDamageButtons.Hint: Hides damage buttons once they have been used.
DCHAT.Clear.Title: Clear {label}
DCHAT.Clear.Tooltip: Clear active tab (SHIFT to clear all)
